name: 12pk Mixed Bower Tumbler Set - Threshold™
description:
Elevate your drinkware collection with this 12-Pack Mixed Bower Tumbler Set from Threshold™. This set includes 12 mixed tumblers of 12.5 ounces and 18.6 ounces to meet your drinkware needs. Plus, they are dishwasher-safe, making them easy to clean and use. Enjoy every sip with these tumblers.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
